meaning: n.尤迪语(高加索语系中一种)  单方面宣告独立 UDI(unilateral declaration of independence)
examples: Tracking data changes using UDI counters.
The soloist in the violin concerto was yeh udi menuhin.
The UDI System provides a unique code for the medical device.
UDI, which had previously resisted constitutional reform, also had reasons to make a deal.
Speedy results feel like success, says Udi Manber, vice president of engineering at Google.
